rows.notes: Consensus across all extractors. Clearly legible header from image.
Consensus on type and amount. gpt-5-mini and gemini-flash have correct description. claude-haiku misread 'Domus' as 'Dornies'.

rows.description: 10 per cent on Estates, Supp Divd 1880
rows.notes: Visual verification: Pounds '66' (consensus of gemini/gpt), Shillings '13' (gpt-5-mini correct). Pence '1' (my visual reading, all extractors had different pence values: gpt '6', gemini '1', claude '3'). Pence fraction '0.75' (gpt-5-mini correctly identified the three-farthing symbol after the 1d). Description is a blend of gpt and gemini's accurate readings. claude-haiku's pounds and shillings are incorrect.
Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's reading for all amounts and the fraction. gemini-flash missed the fraction. claude-haiku's description and amounts are completely incorrect for this row.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. claude-haiku's description and pounds are incorrect.
Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's reading for all amounts. gemini-flash misread pence as 0. claude-haiku's description and pounds are incorrect.

Visual verification confirms 'Masters Composition' is a header, as correctly identified by gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash combined this with the first item and extracted an amount, which is incorrect. claude-haiku misread this entirely.

Visual verification confirms amounts £22 3s 0d (gpt-5-mini). Augmented gpt-5-mini's description to include the internal calculation notes 'Domus 10.5.0 Local Rents 7.3.0' as they are on the same line and contribute to the full entry description. gemini-flash combined this with the prior header. claude-haiku misread completely.

Consensus on amounts from gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash provided the more complete description, including the internal details that are clearly visible on the page for this entry. claude-haiku is incorrect.
Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's reading of '3. Nil' with no amounts. gemini-flash missed 'Nil'. claude-haiku is incorrect.
Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's reading of 3 shillings. gpt-5-mini incorrectly put 3 in pounds column. claude-haiku is completely incorrect.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. claude-haiku incorrectly merged this with a previous description.

rows.description: Int on £57.10-at 3 per Ct 1.14.4 by Plator
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms the main amount is £4 4s 4d, as extracted by gemini-flash and claude-haiku. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted the internal calculation (1.14.4) as the main amount. Description is taken primarily from gemini-flash.

Visual verification confirms the main amount is £4 4s 4d, as extracted by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted the internal calculation (2.10.0) as the main amount. claude-haiku misread the shillings and pence and had a slightly different description. Description from gemini-flash is accurate.

rows.description: Int on £100 at 4 per Cent Augt 18-1881
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description and amounts. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read the year as 1880 and added 'by Do'. claude-haiku misread pounds as 6.

rows.description: Int on £150 at Do to April 1.1880 by Do
rows.notes: Consensus on description and amounts across all three extractors. Minor variations in punctuation for description are ignored.
Visual verification confirms description 'Late Auditors Prize' (gemini-flash) and amounts £13 2s 10d (gpt-5-mini). gemini-flash misread pence as 0. claude-haiku is completely incorrect.

rows.description: Int for one yr to Domus for £500 by Bursar
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gpt-5-mini's description and amounts. gemini-flash misread 'Bursar' as 'Burson'. claude-haiku had multiple description errors.

rows.description: Room Rent Moiety ex cap of
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description and amounts. gpt-5-mini misread pounds as 14, though its notes acknowledged ambiguity. claude-haiku is completely incorrect.
Consensus on description and amounts between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. claude-haiku misread 'Boase' as 'House'.
Visual verification confirms 'July' as a marginal header (gemini-flash). gpt-5-mini incorrectly read 'Jul 14'. claude-haiku missed this header.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's interpretation: '122.15.0' is an internal detail within the description, and the main amount columns are empty (dashes). gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku incorrectly extracted this internal value as the main amount. gpt-5-mini misread 'Shortridge' as 'Shortlands'.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's interpretation: '93.3.4' is an internal detail within the description, and the main amount columns are empty (dashes). gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku incorrectly extracted this internal value as the main amount. claude-haiku misread 'Richards'.

Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's interpretation: '46.19.8' is an internal detail within the description, and the main amount columns are empty (dashes). gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku incorrectly extracted this internal value as the main amount and misread 'Tickell'.

rows.description: Stock of the three funds Total 607.17.4
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's interpretation: '607.17.4' is an internal detail within the description, and the main amount columns are empty (dashes). gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku incorrectly extracted this internal value (and misread it) as the main amount. claude-haiku's description is also very inaccurate.

Visual verification confirms '347.4.0' is an internal detail. The main amount columns for this entry are empty (dashes). gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted the internal value as the main amount. gemini-flash extracted the subtotal below this line as *this row's* amount, which is a misinterpretation. claude-haiku was disqualified for violating the pence hard rule (extracted 19d) for the subtotal it incorrectly mapped to this entry.

Visual override. This is a distinct subtotal row written below the 'Canal Shares Sold' line. The image clearly shows £22 17s 4d. gpt-5-mini correctly identified it as a 'total' but misread the amounts as £2277 19s 4d. gemini-flash incorrectly attributed this amount to the 'Canal Shares Sold' entry itself.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini for this marginal header. claude-haiku missed this header.

rows.description: St Johns College for Witham Road
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description and consensus amounts. gpt-5-mini read 'Selborne' and claude-haiku read 'Is Johns Caling', both incorrect for the college name.

rows.description: H Hammond. Bursar. allowed to Loden
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description and consensus amounts. gpt-5-mini misread 'Loden' as 'Soden' and dropped 'H'. claude-haiku had significant description errors.
Consensus on description and amounts between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. claude-haiku incorrectly identified this as a header, missed amounts, and misread 'Boase' as 'Bonse'.
Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description and amounts. gpt-5-mini missed the opening parenthesis. claude-haiku had errors in description and pounds amount.

Visual override. Pounds, shillings, and pence whole are confirmed to be 3390, 0, and 4 (from gemini-flash/gpt-5-mini consensus on these values). The pence fraction is clearly a three-farthing (¾) symbol, not a half-penny (0.5) as interpreted by gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. claude-haiku misread the pounds as 2390 and missed the fraction.
